channel.title: Self Hosting on sytranvn.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Self Hosting on sytranvn.dev

item.title: My Home Lab
item.description: I use a free GitHub Page to host my blog and map it to my custom domain. I don’t want to deal with a server because it introduces cost over time if I use a cloud server. But sometimes, I really want to have my own server, control all of my private data instead of handing it all over to Google. So while I was unemployed, I played with my home lab, which is just a modem + an old PC, to see what I could achieve.
